subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise and glorification, transcending the recognition of all created beings, beseemeth and befitteth the Lord of all things, despite those who turn aside [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنای مقدس از عرفان اهل انشاء مالک اشیاء را لایق و سزا که رغما للمعرضین
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @suffering and imprisonment, @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
